name: SaaS tenant core and access control implementation

evidence: packages/domain-core/src/index.ts defines Tenant, Workspace, TenantUser, TenantContext, ActorContext, TenantIsolationProbe, explicit tenant ownership factories, and tenant mismatch guard
packages/domain-core/src/tenantPrimitives.test.ts covers missing tenant ownership, tenant mismatch without target label leakage, actor context, and empty optional diagnostic identifier rejection
packages/shared-test-fixtures/src/demoTenants.ts creates deterministic Tenant A and Tenant B with tenant-owned workspaces, users, and private isolation probes
package-lock.json records @kiss-pm/domain-core as a workspace dependency for @kiss-pm/shared-test-fixtures
tests: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 because e2e/tests/phase2 is not implemented yet
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes or external resources; deterministic fixture data only
rows.blocker: Phase-exit verification for required E2E-010 is blocked until later P2 API/UI/phase2 E2E work creates e2e/tests/phase2/tenant-isolation.spec.ts. Fresh proof: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 with 'No tests found'.

evidence: packages/access-control/src/index.ts defines Permission, ScopeRule, AccessProfile, ProfileAssignment, model factories, tenant ownership validation, profile version validation, duplicate permission guard, scope-rule permission consistency guard, raw scope revalidation, and active flag runtime validation

packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts covers tenant-owned versioned access profiles, invalid tenant/version inputs, duplicate permission keys, missing permission references, Phase 2-supported scope values, deserialized unsupported scopes, non-boolean active flags, profile assignments, and typed model errors
package-lock.json records @kiss-pm/domain-core as a workspace dependency for @kiss-pm/access-control
tests: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 because e2e/tests/phase2 is not implemented yet
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes or external resources; pure domain model package only
rows.blocker: Phase-exit verification for required E2E-011 is blocked until later P2 API/UI/phase2 E2E work creates e2e/tests/phase2/access-profile.spec.ts. Fresh proof: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 with 'No tests found'.

evidence: packages/access-control/src/index.ts defines PolicyRequest, PolicyEvaluation, PolicyTargetRef, and deterministic evaluatePolicy with safe trace output

Policy evaluator denies tenant mismatch before target identity appears in trace, denies unsupported requested scopes and raw stored unsupported scope rules with unsupported_scope, denies inactive profiles and missing permissions, and evaluates own/project/tenant/all scopes

packages/access-control/src/policyEvaluator.test.ts covers allow by tenant scope, missing permission, safe tenant mismatch, own/project/tenant/all scope behavior, own/project mismatch, unsupported department requested scope, unsupported raw stored team scope, inactive profile, and requested scope not granted
tests: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 because e2e/tests/phase2 is not implemented yet
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes or external resources; pure deterministic policy evaluation only
rows.blocker: Phase-exit verification for required E2E-010 and E2E-012 is blocked until later P2 API/UI/phase2 E2E work creates e2e/tests/phase2/tenant-isolation.spec.ts and e2e/tests/phase2/read-only-permissions.spec.ts. Fresh proof: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 with 'No tests found'.

evidence: packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts defines TenantConfiguration, TenantLabelSet, TenantLabelChangeTrace, createTenantConfiguration, createTenantLabelSet, updateTenantLabel, and resolveTenantLabel

Tenant label updates are immutable, reject stale expectedConfigurationVersion values, increment configurationVersion, and return previous/current configuration version plus changed key/before/after labels for later API/audit DTOs
resolveTenantLabel requires configured runtime labels or an explicit fallback so internal label keys are not silently exposed to users

apps/web/src/App.tsx reads navigation, role, shell prefix, aria, and shell placeholder labels from a TenantLabelSet; apps/web/src/App.test.tsx proves runtime label overrides change visible navigation, role, tenant/config/user prefixes, and navigation aria label without changing component text literals
package-lock.json records @kiss-pm/tenant-config workspace dependencies for @kiss-pm/web and @kiss-pm/domain-core for @kiss-pm/tenant-config
tests: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 because e2e/tests/phase2 is not implemented yet
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes or external resources; package-lock workspace dependency update only
rows.blocker: Phase-exit verification for required E2E-013 remains blocked until later P2 API/audit/web/E2E rows add POST /admin/labels, audit event persistence, deterministic Phase 2 fixtures, and e2e/tests/phase2/tenant-labels.spec.ts. Current block provides domain trace payload and shell runtime-label read path but not the Phase 2 API/audit write flow. Fresh proof: npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=2 exits 1 with 'No tests found'.

evidence: packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts defines metadata-only CustomFieldDefinition, CustomFieldRegistry, CustomFieldBindingFlags, validation/visibility/permission metadata, supported target entity types, supported value types, and optimistic metadata update result
Custom field definitions are tenant-owned, versioned, use stable keys, preserve valueType/target/key during metadata updates, and reject unsupported target entity types and value types

createCustomFieldRegistry revalidates deserialized definitions, rejects cross-tenant definitions, rejects duplicate keys for the same target entity type, and allows the same key on different target entity types
updateCustomFieldDefinitionMetadata rejects stale expectedVersion values, increments definition version, clones metadata, and does not mutate the input definition
Validation-rule metadata accepts only string, number, boolean, homogeneous string arrays, or homogeneous number arrays, rejecting raw objects and mixed arrays from deserialized input

packages/tenant-config/src/customFields.test.ts covers valid definitions, duplicate keys, invalid target/value/version/tenant inputs, invalid raw validation metadata, metadata update version handling, and typed TenantConfigModelError failures
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes, external resources, UI, API, custom-field values, formula execution, or migrations; metadata-only tenant-config package changes
rows.blocker: None for P2-005; this row has no required E2E scenario.
